artifact_summary: Fiber optic cabling and network hardware layout for the City of Tampa Wastewater Department facilities.
artifact_blurb: A detailed network topology diagram illustrating the fiber optic infrastructure and hardware deployment for the City of Tampa Wastewater Department. The schematic specifically documents interconnections between Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs), media converters, and switches housed within designated enclosures at the Dissolved Air Reactor and Return Sludge Pump Stations.
